description: Make Your Gifts Unforgettable This Christmas! Tired of messy wrapping paper and tangled ribbons? Our premium set of 3 Christmas Gift Boxes is your all-in-one solution for stunning gift presentation! The Perfect Set for Every Present Our assortment includes three beautifully coordinated sizes to fit all your festive gifts Large: 28 x 20 x 9 cm (Ideal for sweaters, toys & hampers) Medium: 20 x 18 x 8 cm (Perfect for books, cosmetics & mugs) Small: 15 x 15 x 7 cm (Great for jewelry, candy & gift cards) Simply choose the box, place your gift inside, and close the lid ‚Äì it's that easy! Luxurious Festive Design Imagine a sparkling red surface, dusted with golden glitter that catches the Christmas tree lights... Each box is elegantly adorned with a rich red satin ribbon and a delicate golden star, creating a truly magical and ready-to-give presentation. Your gifts will be the star of the show under the tree! Sturdy, Reusable & Ready to Shine Crafted from thick, rigid cardboard, these Christmas gift boxes with lids are built to protect your precious gifts. They are pre-assembled for your convenience and designed to be reused year after year, making your gifting both beautiful and eco-friendly. The Ultimate Holiday Wrapping Hack No tape, no fuss, no stress! We've done the work for you. These gift boxes for presents come perfectly finished, eliminating the last-minute wrapping chaos. Spend less time wrapping and more time celebrating the joy of the season with your loved ones! Perfect for: Christmas Day, Stocking Stuffers, Secret Santa, Christmas Parties, and all your holiday celebrations! Order your set now and wrap your Christmas magic with ease!
